name: sbg-mutation-workspace
description: Dev-only mutation-testing workspace (StrykerJS). Lives under maintainers/ so it is NEVER copied into a generated brain. See ../plans/prospective/mutation-testing-stryker.md.
comment: Configs run from the REPO ROOT (Stryker only mutates files under its project root). The scripts cd ../.. then invoke the locally-installed Stryker bin against a maintainers/mutation/ config.

scripts.mutate:all: npm run mutate:rag && npm run mutate:local-mirror && npm run mutate:scripts
